name: OPTEX GROUP Company, Limited
summary: OPTEX GROUP Company, Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells security sensors and automatic door sensors in Japan and internationally. It operates through Sensing Solution Business, Factory Automation Business, Machine Vision Lighting Business, and Electronic Manufacturing Service Business segments. The company offers sensors and LED lighting for factory automation and image inspections; and industrial computers and systems. It also provides measuring instruments, traffic safety sensors, customer traffic counting systems, and electronic components. In addition, the company develops various systems and applications, such as digital content; provides equipment electronics manufacturing services. The company was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in Otsu, Japan.
